title: armeria atlantica subvar. fibrosa
intro: Armeria atlantica subvar. fibrosa, also known as the Atlantic sea thrift or fibrous thrift, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plumbaginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Armeria atlantica subvar. fibrosa include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to address various health issues, but its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research.
